# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- type: gcp-types/compute-v1:vpcs
  name: my-vpc
  properties:
    region: us-central1
- type: gcp-types/compute-v1:subnetworks
  name: my-subnet-public
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: auto
    network: $(ref.my-vpc.selfLink)
- type: gcp-types/compute-v1:subnetworks
  name: my-subnet-private-app
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: auto
    network: $(ref.my-vpc.selfLink)
- type: gcp-types/compute-v1:subnetworks
  name: my-subnet-private-db
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: auto
    network: $(ref.my-vpc.selfLink)
